live.title: Live View
live.webrtcHint: Enable RTSP main + WebRTC in streaming settings for low-latency view:

schedule.errTimeRange: End time must be after start time

storage.sdSectionDesc: Configure LAN sharing and the recording write mode for the SD card.
storage.nasSectionDesc: Connection info for a NAS (SMB/CIFS share) used as a recording/timelapse destination. Used when "Save to NAS" is enabled in each recording setting.
storage.eraseConfirmBody: Deletes the recording folders (continuous and alarm) on the SD card. This cannot be undone.

hub.integrationsDesc: Pick the service you want to use — we take care of the required stream settings.

frigate.desc: AI-detection NVR. Connects with the officially recommended two-stream setup: detect on the sub stream, record on the main stream.
frigate.hint: Paste this example into Frigate's config.yml.

ha.desc: Bring the live view in via the go2rtc add-on or the Generic Camera integration.

youtube.title: Live streaming (YouTube Live etc.)
youtube.desc: Stream the camera directly to any RTMP-capable platform.
youtube.autoNote: Saving automatically enables the main stream with AAC audio. Enter the platform's RTMP URL + stream key.

homekit.title: Apple Home (HomeKit)
homekit.desc: Add the camera to the Home app on iPhone / iPad / Mac.
homekit.pinAfterSave: A PIN is generated on save and shown here.
homekit.steps: Home app → Add Accessory → "More options…" and enter this PIN.

hub.streamsDesc: The RTSP streams that power the integrations. Copy a URL or hand it to a player (VLC etc.) via QR code.
hub.subHint: Low resolution (360p). Ideal for AI detection (Frigate's detect role) and mobile viewing.
hub.memWarn: Enabling multiple streams together with WebRTC/live streaming approaches the memory limit (measured: 61/87MB with RTSP+WebRTC). Turn off what you don't use.
hub.hevcNote: HEVC (H.265) saves bandwidth but has limited player support and uses more memory. The main H.264 stream is recommended for most setups.

camera.holdToCompare: Click to toggle between the previous and current look (takes 1–2 s)

events.webhookDesc: POSTs a JSON payload to any server when an event occurs.
events.presetsNote: ntfy works with this URL form as-is. Discord / Slack use a different JSON format, so route them through a relay.
events.mqttDesc: Integrate with Home Assistant etc. via an MQTT broker.
events.mqttDiscovery: Saving with MQTT enabled sends Home Assistant MQTT Discovery config so a sensor is added automatically.
events.eventsDesc: Choose which events trigger a notification. Sent to both WebHook and MQTT.
events.needTarget: Set a WebHook URL or MQTT first
